user_parameters_schema.description: Configure your ServerChan endpoint for this enrollment

webhook_base_url_secret.description: Name of the customer secret containing the base URL of your ServerChan server (e.g. https://hooks.slack.com)
webhook_base_url_secret.title: Webhook Base URL Secret Name

webhook_path_secret.description: Name of the customer secret containing the webhook path (e.g. /{sendkey}.send)
webhook_path_secret.title: Webhook Path Secret Name

user_parameters_schema.title: ServerChan Transformer Configuration

webhook_base_url_secret.ui:description: Enter the name of the customer secret that holds the base URL (scheme + host) of your ServerChan webhook

webhook_path_secret.ui:description: Enter the name of the customer secret that holds the webhook path
